question: Which of the following statements is correct regarding business cycles? (MTP Jun’24 Apr’25, MP[4]) (a) Business cycles are contagious and international in character. options.a: Business cycles are contagious and international in character.
options.b: Business cycles begin in one country and spread to other countries through trade relations.
options.c: Business cycles have serious consequences on well-being of the societies.
